response.original_title: ヌードモデルNTR 上司と羞恥に溺れた妻の衝撃的浮気映像 - 結城花乃羽
response.overview: This wasn't supposed to happen... Three years into my marriage with my wife, Hanaha, I work as an editor for a women's magazine, and I've been given an impossible task. Mr. Oshima, a famous photographer, told me he wanted to photograph an amateur woman, not a professional model, and asked if he could photograph my wife. She would wear clothes, but it would be a photoshoot with a male model... My wife agreed, thinking it would only be once, and we accepted Mr. Oshima's proposal. Then, on the day of the shoot, Mr. Oshima took a liking to my wife more than I had imagined, and asked if he could photograph her nude next time.
response.title: Nude Model NTR: Shocking Footage of a Wife's Affair with Her Boss, Drowning in Shame - Kanoha Yuki
